name: Terminal Emulator
description: Interactive terminal input/output area with command history, tab completion, and ANSI color support.

standard.description: Scrollable output with input line and command prompt

slots.output: Scrollable command output with ANSI color support
slots.input: Command input with $ prompt and blinking cursor
slots.history: Command history accessible via up/down arrows

readonly.description: Output only display, no input capability

code.imports:
import { tags } from 'decantr/tags';
import { css } from 'decantr/css';

split.description: Input and output in separate panes

code.imports:
import { tags } from 'decantr/tags';
import { css } from 'decantr/css';

slots.output: Scrollable command output with ANSI color support
slots.input: Command input with prompt and cursor
